prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: cinematic scene still. Story world: Dead Channel Protocol. Premise: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move.. Setting: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes. Threat presence: Root Administrator. Recurring motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Beat: Trust Fracture (Interference). Narrative: The villain mixes real secrets with fabricated claims to split allies.. Render an immersive scene frame with spatial depth and hidden clue affordance.. Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller. Tone: GROUNDED. Immediate scene brief: The villain mixes real secrets with fabricated claims to split allies.. Render an immersive scene frame with spatial depth and hidden clue affordance.. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. Absolutely no visible letters, words, signage, subtitles, captions, runes, glyphs, pseudo-text, document copy, watermark, logo, title treatment, UI overlay, labels, poster typography, or debug text. Create a dramatic environmental still with human-scale tension, investigative clues, and a slow-burn horror mood.
source_prompt: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts.
